operation.name: addOffsetPtr_at_psmgr_session_lookup
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun enc_class () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (_ bv0 32) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv1 32) ) (select  enc_class (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun enc_class () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (_ bv2 32) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv1 32) ) (select  enc_class (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun enc_class () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (_ bv1 32) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_class (_ bv1 32) ) (select  enc_class (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_session.session_id is interpreted consistently across all live consumers
assumptions: resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
